summary: Backport the stream pump backpressure fix while preserving target codec and telemetry boundaries.

decisions.summary: Backpressure fix belongs to this patch.
decisions.reason: It directly satisfies the stop condition and preserves the existing public seam.

decisions.summary: Regression coverage for the ported fix.
decisions.reason: The acceptance contract needs a local proof for the fast-producer case.

decisions.summary: Codec refactor is outside this patch.
decisions.reason: It is adjacent upstream churn, not required for the backpressure stop condition.

decisions.summary: Target telemetry model must not be overwritten.
decisions.reason: Telemetry requires a prerequisite target decision before any donor behavior can land.

decisions.summary: Donor CI configuration is not wanted in this fork.
decisions.reason: The target owns its CI workflow independently.

conflictClusters.title: Stream pump backpressure without codec refactor
conflictClusters.reason: The pump fix must land without importing the upstream codec refactor.

operatorNotes: README-only donor context was not part of this donor range.
